## Release checklist

<!-- Remove this section for non-release PRs. -->

- [ ] `pyproject.toml` version bumped to `X.Y.Z`
- [ ] Tag `vX.Y.Z` will be created after merge to `main`
- [ ] Release notes reviewed in PR description
